seo.title: Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu & Kids Martial Arts in Jackson Heights, Queens
seo.description: Train Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, kids martial arts, kickboxing, Muay Thai, MMA, and toddler Jiu-Jitsu at @JiuJitsuNYC in Jackson Heights, Queens. Beginner-friendly, visual, community-driven training with no contracts.

hero.imageAlt: Kids and adults training martial arts at @JiuJitsuNYC in Queens
hero.title: Train harder. Move better. Build confidence for life.
hero.lede: @JiuJitsuNYC is a visual, high-energy martial arts academy for kids, adults, beginners, families, and competitors — right on Northern Blvd between 82nd and 83rd Street.

highlights.label: Jackson Heights
highlights.text: Northern Blvd at 83rd St, near E/F/7/R/M trains

highlights.label: Kids + adults
highlights.text: Programs for toddlers, teens, beginners, families, and competitors

highlights.label: No contracts
highlights.text: Straightforward pricing and easy first-class sign up

intro.title: A Queens martial arts academy built for real progress.
body: Step onto the mat for practical martial arts training that is clear, disciplined, and welcoming from day one. Kids learn focus and confidence; adults build real skill, conditioning, and self-defense instincts.
Students build practical self-defense, strength, discipline, friendships, and resilience through structured coaching — not generic fitness copy.

programsSection.title: Find the right class faster.
programsSection.copy: Clear paths for parents, adult beginners, returning athletes, and students ready to compete.

programs.title: Kids Jiu-Jitsu
programs.copy: Confidence, coordination, anti-bullying skills, and real grappling fundamentals in a structured Queens academy environment.

programs.title: Toddler Jiu-Jitsu
programs.copy: A first martial arts experience built around movement, listening, balance, and safe play for young children.

programs.title: Adult Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu
programs.copy: Learn leverage-based self-defense, no-gi and gi fundamentals, pressure-tested technique, and competition-ready training.

programs.title: Kickboxing & Muay Thai
programs.copy: Striking classes for fitness, discipline, footwork, defense, and practical confidence without long-term contracts.

firstClass.imageAlt: @JiuJitsuNYC coaches and students inside the Jackson Heights academy
bullets: Dedicated surfaces for kids, toddlers, adults, and striking programs.
Clear location details for Jackson Heights, Queens — between 82nd and 83rd Street on Northern Blvd.
Community-first coaching with practical progress you can feel.
firstClass.copy: Whether you are signing up a child, returning to training, or trying martial arts for the first time, the next move is simple: choose a program, check the schedule, and start with a beginner-friendly class.
firstClass.title: Parents and new students should not have to hunt for the next step.

instagramSection.title: Latest from the academy.
instagramSection.copy: The newest public @jiujitsunyc posts in chronological order, newest first — fast on the website, with each card opening the original Instagram post.

featuredUpdates.title: Programs, events, and academy news.
featuredUpdates.copy: Latest from the academy: class details, events, training notes, and student stories.
